overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a dystopian urban neighborhood during a yellow acid rain storm. The player navigates from a main sidewalk into a back alley with dumpsters and accumulated trash, then returns to the street approaching a large intersection with towering neon billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk lined with palm trees and wooden houses

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk following a small group of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the sidewalk
wooden utility poles with multiple crossbars and hanging wires
two-story yellow wooden residential building with external stairs
large concrete highway overpass structure visible in the distance
rain-soaked concrete pavement reflecting the yellow storm light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dystopian urban sidewalk during a heavy yellow storm. The player walks forward following a small group of pedestrians, passing palm trees and wooden houses while utility poles line the right side. The wet pavement reflects the hazy yellow light, and a large concrete overpass is visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with dumpsters and accumulated trash

events.description: turns right off the main sidewalk into a narrow alley between buildings

agents.ego_description: turning right into the narrow passage between buildings and navigating around obstacles

entered.detail: large green industrial dumpster with yellow lid markings
accumulated piles of blue and white garbage bags
weathered wooden barrier blocking the end of the alley
tall dry grass and weeds growing through cracks in the pavement

segments.scene_description: The player turns right into a narrow enclosed alley between buildings, leaving the main street behind. The space is cluttered with a large green dumpster, piles of garbage bags, and overgrown weeds. The wooden fence at the end blocks direct passage, creating a confined and neglected atmosphere sheltered from the storm.

scene_state.functional_zone: rear service area behind commercial buildings with murals

events.description: turns left to navigate around the corner of the building with the flag mural

agents.ego_description: navigating around the back of the buildings, passing a structure with a large American flag mural

entered.detail: wooden building with large painted American flag mural on the side
wide concrete stairs leading up to a building entrance
large illuminated billboard advertising 24/7 store with blue and red neon

segments.scene_description: Navigating the rear service area, the player turns left around a building featuring a prominent American flag mural. Concrete stairs lead up to a side entrance on the left, while the massive neon 24/7 billboard becomes visible in the distance. The area shows signs of neglect with scattered debris and weathered structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: major urban intersection with towering commercial billboards

events.description: emerges from the alley back onto the main street approaching a large intersection
vehicles visible driving on the wet road at the intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: walking toward the large intersection, following other pedestrians crossing the street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair walking ahead toward the crosswalk

entered.detail: massive multi-story commercial building topped with the illuminated 24/7 STORE sign
tall traffic signal pole with multiple lights at the intersection
raised highway structure with vehicles visible on the upper level

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the alley, the scene opens into a wide urban intersection dominated by a massive commercial building with the glowing 24/7 STORE billboard. The player follows pedestrians toward the crosswalk as sparse vehicle traffic moves through the intersection. Palm trees line the approach while traffic lights and an elevated highway structure frame the dystopian cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked urban sidewalk through a derelict service alley and back into a sprawling neon-lit intersection. It begins by following a group of pedestrians along a street lined with palm trees and wooden houses, where the wet pavement reflects the hazy yellow light of a heavy storm. As the camera turns right, the open street is replaced by the confined atmosphere of a narrow alley cluttered with green dumpsters, garbage bags, and overgrown weeds. The scene then shifts as the camera navigates around a building featuring an American flag mural and concrete stairs, gradually revealing a massive glowing billboard in the distance. Finally, the camera emerges from the neglected rear area into a wide intersection dominated by a towering 24/7 store sign, moving toward a crosswalk beneath an elevated highway structure.
